afterSnapshot.name: testDirectionsHourlyStructure

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Verify the analyzeDirections API response includes hourly arrays on each direction with the correct structure, validating the new compass rose animation data.
implementation: Call /api/directions with a known coastal location, verify each direction has an hourly array with score/rating/summary fields, and check array length matches the configured forecast hours.
